name: Sara Restaurant
sourceQuote: The Kit on Sara Toronto: "an all-singing, all-dancing, spray-oscillating, seat-warming, automatically-opening-and-closing Toto toilet"; guests return from the bathroom telling others they have to try it.

name: Grand Nikko Bangkok Sathorn
sourceQuote: Grand Nikko Bangkok Sathorn official rooms page: "Experience elevated comfort with the TOTO WASHLET, featuring warm-water cleansing, adjustable functions, and seamless Japanese hygiene technology."

name: The Sukhothai Bangkok
sourceQuote: The Sukhothai Bangkok Deluxe Room amenities list includes "Washlet in main bathroom and powder room" alongside refurbished bathrooms with new Indian stone finishes.

name: Mandarin Oriental, Bangkok
sourceQuote: Luxury Intel review: "Post-renovation rooms are elegant without being showy — teak, Thai textiles, Toto washlets, excellent beds, and river-view balconies worth paying up for."

name: Mandarin Oriental, Tokyo
sourceQuote: Mighty Travels hotel review: "At the Mandarin Oriental Tokyo, guests will discover the TOTO Neorest smart toilets" with automatic flushing, heated seats, and adjustable bidet settings.

name: Park Hyatt Tokyo
sourceQuote: Mighty Travels: "The Park Hyatt Tokyo stands out for its focus on comfort, especially in the bathrooms. Their washlets go beyond the usual, with advanced temperature control for both the seat and water."

name: Four Seasons Hotel Tokyo at Otemachi
bidetType: High-tech washlet with automated lid and flush
sourceQuote: Mighty Travels: "At the Four Seasons Hotel Tokyo at Otemachi, automated lid and flush functions in the bathrooms underscore the hotel's focus on modern convenience" with heated seats and adaptable cleansing choices.

name: The Peninsula Tokyo
bidetType: Japanese-style washlet with customizable water pressure
sourceQuote: Mighty Travels: "At The Peninsula Tokyo, guests discover an impressive ability to fine-tune water pressure in their bathrooms" alongside advanced Japanese-style washlet features.

name: Andaz Tokyo Toranomon Hills
sourceQuote: Mighty Travels: "At the Andaz Tokyo Toranomon Hills, it's the auto-cleaning tech within their Japanese-style toilets that grabs attention" with heated seats, water temperature and pressure control, and a self-cleaning cycle.

name: The Ritz-Carlton, Tokyo
sourceQuote: Mighty Travels hotel review section on The Ritz-Carlton Tokyo discusses built-in washlet amenities alongside the hotel's luxury bathroom fixtures in guest rooms.

name: Aman Tokyo
sourceQuote: Mighty Travels: "Aman Tokyo has focused on creating a serene atmosphere" with integrated night lighting and Japanese-style washlet amenities in guest bathrooms.

name: SCHLIEN Sàrl
sourceQuote: TOTO Try WASHLET finder lists SCHLIEN Sàrl (Junglinster): "WASHLET® RX in the guest toilet."
accessNote: Dealer showroom — try a WASHLET during business hours

name: Brandt S.á.r.l.
address: 1 rue de la Sûre, L-6484 Echternach
sourceQuote: TOTO Try WASHLET finder lists Brandt S.á.r.l. (Echternach): "WASHLET® RW in the guest toilet."
accessNote: Dealer showroom — try a WASHLET during business hours

name: Chauffage Sanitaire Barthel S.A.
sourceQuote: TOTO Try WASHLET finder lists Chauffage Sanitaire Barthel S.A. (Hosingen): "WASHLET® SW, WASHLET® RW in the guest toilet."
accessNote: Dealer showroom — try a WASHLET during business hours
